label:
艾尔达蒙职业
Eldamon Classes

Eldamon Trainer.name: 艾尔达蒙训练师 Eldamon Trainer
Eldamon Trainer.description:
尽管大陆各地的许多人可能会与一两只艾达蒙成为朋友，但你一直与这些神秘的元素生灵有着更深的联系，使你能够在更深层次上与它们建立羁绊。你可以通过用自己的相位与它们的相位进行交换，训练它们相位进入物质世界；并且随着你们的羁绊与理解一同成长，你可以帮助它们进化为更强大的形态。

无论是在为生命而战，还是参与艾达蒙喜爱的模拟战斗，有你的艾达蒙伙伴在身旁，你将成为最好的自己，并向世界证明自己！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.6S4x7ImBEK779qaQ]{Eldamon Trainer}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.b0sM0cGjjcCc106P]{Eldamon Trainer Key Terms}

While many folk across the land might befriend an eldamon or two, you've always had a deeper connection to these mystical elemental beings, allowing you to bond with them on a deeper level. You can train them to phase into the material world by trading your own phase with theirs, and through growing your bond and understanding together, you can help them evolve a more powerful form.

Whether fighting for your life or engaging in the mock battles eldamon enjoy, with your eldamon friends at your side, you're going to become the best you can and prove yourself to the world!

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.6S4x7ImBEK779qaQ]{Eldamon Trainer}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.b0sM0cGjjcCc106P]{Eldamon Trainer Key Terms}

Elemental Avatar.name: 元素化身 Elemental Avatar
Elemental Avatar.description:
无论你是否明白这是如何发生的，你已开始体现一种被称为“eldamon”的神秘元素存在，从而赋予你神秘的元素力量。通过敞开你的心智与灵魂，并与自身内在沉睡的存在调谐，你能够显化出越来越多它的元素力量。然而，你远不止是eldamon力量的容器。将你自身独特的特质与你新的元素力量结合起来，你可以超越元素的限制，并运用连eldamon自身也从未能做到的能力。你是二十元素的活之化身，一位元素化身！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.LaKa2D3zqy68E8xO]{元素化身}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.xx3klw3MyRYXmYno]{元素化身关键术语}

Whether you understand how it happened or not, you've come to embody a mystical elemental being known as an eldamon, granting you mysterious elemental powers. By opening up your mind and soul and attuning to the dormant being within yourself, you are able to manifest more and more of its elemental power. You're far more than just a receptacle for the eldamon's powers, however. By combining your own unique properties with your new elemental powers, you can transcend the element's limits and use abilities that even the eldamon itself never could. You are a living embodiment of the twenty elements, an elemental avatar!

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.LaKa2D3zqy68E8xO]{Elemental Avatar}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm.JournalEntryPage.xx3klw3MyRYXmYno]{Elemental Avatar Key Terms}
